requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL expose durable control-signal events as stream data and current scheduler readiness as signal/projection data without mixing the two.

case.given: The runtime emits mailbox enqueue, control interrupt, async completion, resume, suspend, or cancellation facts
case.when: These facts enter the data plane
case.then: The facts SHALL be represented as ordered control event stream records
They SHALL carry causation id, correlation id, fiber id, actor key, mailbox kind, priority, and idempotency key where applicable

case.given: The scheduler derives whether a fiber is ready, running, suspended, interrupted, or blocked
case.when: The public runtime data plane exposes current scheduler state
case.then: The current state SHALL be exposed as signal or signal projection
The runtime SHALL NOT encode current readiness by appending fake semantic events
